mentions.note: Airlines putting up terrific numbers; Delta arguably best-run airline; expect fine quarter from earnings.
Part of 'Big Five Travel' theme; terrific trades ahead of earnings.

CEO Ed Bastian reported unexpectedly strong leisure and business travel demand despite $95 oil environment. Real-world fundamentals clash with Wall Street pessimism; real world won. Defies bearish airline sector narrative.
Excellent CEO Ed Bastian, reliable earner in volatile group. War escalation and possible month-long conflict would hurt airline demand and numbers. Reports Wednesday before open.
Airline used for endless day-trading games based on oil/Iran rumors; Cramer criticizes lack of skill edge in these trades; discipline required if holding.
